title: The Geopolitics of AGI
description: How might advanced AI, including the potential emergence of artificial general intelligence (AGI), reshape global politics and security? Jim Mitre and Joel Predd discuss RAND's Geopolitics of AGI initiative and explore what policymakers need to know.
